name: GBT27930IL_SetDelayForStateTransition
title: GBT27930IL_SetDelayForStateTransition
syntax: long GBT27930IL_SetDelayForStateTransition(dbNode node , double stateTransition, double delay); // form 2
description: Defines delay for a state transition.

parameters.description: After the K3 and K4 are closed (resp. GBT27930IL_StartChargingSimulation() is called): Start sending of CHM

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BHM: Stop sending of CHM and start sending of CRM (BMS is not recognized)
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CHM: Start sending of BHM

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BRM: Stop sending of CRM (BMS is not recognized) and start sending of CRM (BMS is recognized)
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CRM (BMS is not recognized): Stop sending of BHM and start sending of BRM

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BCP: Stop sending of CRM (BMS is recognized) and start sending of CML
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CRM (BMS is recognized): Stop sending of BRM and start sending of BCP

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BRO (Ready for charging): Stop sending of CML and start sending of CRO (Not ready for charging)
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CML: Stop sending of BCP and start sending of BRO (Not ready for charging)

parameters.type: After the sending of CRO (Not ready for charging) is started: Stop sending of CRO (Not ready for charging) and start sending of CRO (Ready for charging)
parameters.description: After the sending of BRO (Not ready for charging) is started: Stop sending of BRO (Not ready for charging) and start sending of BRO (Ready for charging)

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BCS: Stop sending of CRO (Ready for charging) and start sending of CCS
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CRO (Not ready for charging): Stop sending of BRO (Ready for charging) and start sending of BCL
After the sending of BCL is started: In addition to sending BCL, start sending BCS

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BST: Stop sending of CCS and start sending of CST. This is used when the BMS suspends charging.
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CCS: In addition to sending BCL and BCS, start sending BSM. If configured, BMV and BMT are also sent.
After the appearance of the CST: Stop sending of BST and start sending of BSD. This is used when the BMS suspends charging.

parameters.type: After the appearance of the BSD: Stop sending of CST and start sending of CSD
parameters.description: After the appearance of the CST: Stop sending of BCL, BCS and BSM and start sending of BST. This is used when the Charger suspends charging.

parameters.type: After the sending of the CSD is started: Stop sending of CSD, end of charging
parameters.description: After the sending of the BST is started: Stop sending of BST and start sending of BSD. This is used when the Charger suspends charging.
After the sending of the BSD is started: Stop sending of BSD, end of charging

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Time (in ms) for which the state transition is to be delayed.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

return: After the K3 and K4 are
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
